text.title: PRD via AI Without Losing Why Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the artefact this methodology produces. Validator script enforces required keys and forbidden patterns.

schema.code: { "$schema": "http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#", "$id": "https://faion.net/schemas/prd-via-ai-without-losing-why.json", "title": "PRD via AI Without Losing Why", "type": "object", "required": [ "prd_id", "owner", "last_touched", "why", "outcome", "anti_goals", "scope", "citation_chain" ], "properties": { "prd_id": {}, "owner": {}, "last_touched": {}, "why": {}, "outcome": {}, "anti_goals": {}, "scope": {}, "citation_chain": {} }, "additionalProperties": true }

example.note: Missing required fields; violates schema constraints for `prd-via-ai-without-losing-why`. Validator rejects with explicit violation list.

section.title: Forbidden patterns
section.pattern: any scope item not traceable to a why citation
